# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        text(name: 'BUILD_COMMAND', defaultValue: '', description: 'Enter custom build commands. Leave blank to skip this stage.\n\nExample:\n#!/bin/bash\nmvn clean install -DskipTests\nchmod +x myscript.sh && ./myscript.sh build')
        text(name: 'TEST_COMMAND', defaultValue: '', description: 'Enter custom test commands. Leave blank to skip this stage.\n\nExample:\n#!/bin/bash\nnpm test --coverage\npython -m pytest tests/')
        text(name: 'DEPLOY_COMMAND', defaultValue: '', description: 'Enter custom deployment commands. Leave blank to skip this stage.\n\nExample:\n#!/bin/bash\nkubectl apply -f deployment.yaml --namespace production\naws s3 sync ./dist s3://my-webapp-bucket --delete')
    }

    stages {
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (params.BUILD_COMMAND && params.BUILD_COMMAND.trim() != '') {
                        echo "--- Executing Custom Build Commands ---"
                        sh "${params.BUILD_COMMAND}"
                    } else {
                        echo "BUILD_COMMAND parameter is empty. Skipping custom build step."
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Test') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (params.TEST_COMMAND && params.TEST_COMMAND.trim() != '') {
                        echo "--- Executing Custom Test Commands ---"
                        sh "${params.TEST_COMMAND}"
                    } else {
                        echo "TEST_COMMAND parameter is empty. Skipping custom test step."
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Deploy') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (params.DEPLOY_COMMAND && params.DEPLOY_COMMAND.trim() != '') {
                        echo "--- Executing Custom Deployment Commands ---"
                        sh "${params.DEPLOY_COMMAND}"
                    } else {
                        echo "DEPLOY_COMMAND parameter is empty. Skipping custom deployment step."
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        always {
            echo 'Pipeline finished, checking overall status.'
        }
        success {
            echo 'Pipeline completed successfully!'
        }
        failure {
            echo 'Pipeline failed! Check the logs for details.'
        }
    }
}
